summary: Workspaces scheduled for migration are unavailable during cutover window.

updates.details: Check the schedule to see dates for specific workspaces.

summary: Advance notice of next regular scheduled maintenance day

updates.details: Scheduled maintenance day Tuesday 14 July 2026: expect disruption to all CEDA & JASMIN services. Please plan your work accordingly.

summary: Node in gpumig partition still down for maintenance

updates.details: An issue was identified following scheduled maintenance on 14/4/2026: work is now underway to resolve this but the node remains unavailable.
The gpumig partition is now available.

summary: Network traffic issue between JASMIN and Met Office
Old (VIO7) JASMIN Cloud is being decommissioned on 21/04/26

updates.details: All tenants should have access to the new cloud. All machines on the old cloud will be switched off 14/04/26
The deadline for all machines to be migrated has been extended to 21/04/26
